metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: SemperisLightning data connector with template version 3.0.0

connectorUiConfig.title: Semperis Lightning Logs
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Semperis Lightning](https://www.semperis.com/platform/) connector uses Azure Functions to ingest Semperis Lightning identity security data into Microsoft Sentinel. The connector deploys an Azure Function and collects data into custom Log Analytics tables for investigation and threat hunting.

sampleQueries.query:
LightningTier0Nodes_CL
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

LightningAttackPaths_CL
| where RiskScore >= 70
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

LightningIOEResults_CL
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

dataTypes.name: LightningTier0Nodes_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningTier0Nodes_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningAttackPaths_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningAttackPaths_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningAttackPathLinks_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningAttackPathLinks_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningTier0Attackers_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningTier0Attackers_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningIndicatorExecutions_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningIndicatorExecutions_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningIOEsMetadata_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningIOEsMetadata_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: LightningIOEResults_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
LightningIOEResults_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

value:
union isfuzzy=true LightningTier0Nodes_CL, LightningAttackPaths_CL, LightningAttackPathLinks_CL, LightningTier0Attackers_CL, LightningIndicatorExecutions_CL, LightningIOEsMetadata_CL, LightningIOEResults_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace are required.

read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required. [See the documentation to learn more about workspace keys](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-windows#obtain-workspace-id-and-key).

customs.name: Microsoft.Web/sites permissions
customs.description: Read and write permissions to Azure Functions to create a Function App is required. [See the documentation to learn more about Azure Functions](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-functions/).

customs.name: Semperis Lightning API credentials
customs.description: A Semperis Lightning **API Key** and selected **Zone** (na or eu) are required to authenticate the connector to Semperis Lightning.

instructionSteps.description: >**NOTE:** This connector uses Azure Functions to connect to Semperis Lightning and pull data into Microsoft Sentinel. This might result in additional data ingestion costs. Check the [Azure Functions pricing page](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/functions/) for details.

>**(Optional Step)** Securely store workspace and API authorization key(s) in Azure Key Vault. Azure Key Vault provides a secure mechanism to store and retrieve key values. [Follow these instructions](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/app-service/app-service-key-vault-references) to use Azure Key Vault with an Azure Function App.
>Ensure the workspace is added to Microsoft Sentinel before deploying the connector.

1. Sign in to your Semperis Lightning tenant.
2. Create or retrieve a valid **Semperis API Key** for connector access.
3. Confirm your **Semperis Zone** value (**na** for North America or **eu** for Europe) for use during deployment.
instructionSteps.title: STEP 1 - Configure access for Semperis Lightning

instructionSteps.description:
1. Click the **Deploy to Azure** button below.

	[![Deploy To Azure](https://aka.ms/deploytoazurebutton)](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_CreateUIDef/CustomDeploymentBlade/uri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2FAzure%2FAzure-Sentinel%2Fmaster%2FSolutions%2FSemperisLightning%2FData%20Connectors%2FSemperisLightningLogs%2Fazuredeploy_Connector_SemperisLightning_AzureFunction.json/uiFormDefinitionUri/https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2FAzure%2FAzure-Sentinel%2Fmaster%2FSolutions%2FSemperisLightning%2FData%20Connectors%2FSemperisLightningLogs%2FcreateUiDef.json)
instructionSteps.title: STEP 2 - Deploy the 'Semperis Lightning Logs' connector and the associated Azure Function

instructionSteps.description:
1. Select the preferred **Subscription** and an existing **Resource Group**.
2. Enter an existing **Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID** belonging to the resource group.
3. Click **Next**.
4. Enter your **Semperis API Key** and select the **Semperis Zone**.
5. Optionally adjust the **Connector Schedule** (default: every 1 hour).
6. Review the settings and click **Create**.
instructionSteps.title: STEP 3 - Set the connector parameters

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

This custom data connector uses a Function App to pull Semperis Lightning data and uploads it into the selected Log Analytics workspace via the Azure Log Ingestion API.

Note: There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Link to product website

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
